note: plan_mode_entered assertion dropped — EnterPlanMode unavailable in subagent eval context

evals.prompt: audit the CI pipeline — I want to understand what gates we have, what's missing, and make a plan to fill any gaps
evals.expected_output: Parallel Explore agents fanned out over CI facets, findings aggregated with EXISTING/GAP/INCONSISTENCY prefixes preserved, clarifying questions via AskUserQuestion, structured plan written inline.

assertions.name: parallel_explore_agents
assertions.description: Summary mentions 3+ Explore agents spawned in parallel (single message)

assertions.name: report_format_used
assertions.description: Aggregated findings preserve EXISTING: / GAP: / INCONSISTENCY: prefixes on individual items (not rewritten as prose Theme labels)

assertions.name: gaps_verified
assertions.description: Summary notes claimed gaps were verified against actual repo files before surfacing

assertions.name: ask_user_question_called
assertions.description: AskUserQuestion was used for clarifying questions (not skipped)

assertions.name: no_files_edited
assertions.description: No source, test, or config files were written or edited
